prompts.title: 7-Day Bali Honeymoon Itinerary
prompts.prompt: Act as a senior outbound travel agent (TAFI / IATO member). Build a 7-day Bali honeymoon itinerary for an Indian couple (₹2.4L all-inclusive ex-Mumbai). Cover daily breakdown (Ubud, Seminyak, Nusa Dua, Uluwatu) with: (a) hotels (4-star), (b) day-by-day activities, (c) candle-light dinners, (d) photo-op stops, (e) airport transfers, (f) visa-on-arrival note, (g) currency tips, (h) Hindu temple etiquette (sarong + sash), (i) emergency contact. Constraints: 18% GST on tour operator service; vegetarian + Jain meal options; honeymoon kit; INR pricing transparent.

prompts.title: Destination Description for Goa Package
prompts.prompt: Act as a travel content writer with 6 years for MakeMyTrip / Yatra. Write a 220-word destination description for a 4-night Goa beach package targeting Indian families (parents + kids 8-14). Capture: (1) sensory hook (a quintessential Goa moment), (2) 4 must-do family activities, (3) heritage-Indian + Portuguese-colonial dimension, (4) seasonality note (best Nov-Feb), (5) safety + family-friendliness, (6) culinary hook (kokum, fish curry, bebinca). Constraints: avoid clichés; vivid Indian-family lens; mention specific places (Mandovi cruise, Calangute, Old Goa Basilica); 220 words.

prompts.title: Client Proposal (Group Booking)
prompts.prompt: Act as a senior travel sales manager. Draft a 1-page proposal for a 32-pax corporate offsite (Bengaluru tech company) at Coorg in Aug 2026. Cover: (1) hotel options (3 properties — coffee plantation, hill villa, boutique resort), (2) 4-day itinerary (offsite agenda + leisure mix), (3) F&B (3 meals + tea + 2 cocktail evenings), (4) transport (Bengaluru-Coorg AC bus), (5) AV for offsite sessions, (6) team-building activities (rafting, plantation walk, bonfire), (7) per-pax cost (₹14K-₹18K + GST), (8) terms (advance, cancellation), (9) HR-friendly billing. Constraints: 18% GST; FY-end timing; 30-60-10 cancellation policy; backup weather plan.

prompts.title: Visa Documentation Checklist
prompts.prompt: Act as a visa specialist with 10 years across Schengen, USA, UK, Australia, Japan visas. Build a personalised visa-document checklist for an Indian family (parents + 2 kids) applying for Schengen tourist visa for a 14-day France-Italy-Switzerland trip. Cover: (1) appointment (VFS Global), (2) form filling, (3) financial proofs (bank statement 6 months, ITR 3 years, salary slip), (4) employment letter, (5) hotel + flight bookings, (6) travel insurance (≥€30K cover), (7) cover letter draft, (8) child-specific docs (NOC, birth certificate). Constraints: latest 2026 Schengen norms; INR/€ amounts; child consent if travelling without one parent; biometric appointment buffer.

prompts.title: Complaint Resolution Letter to Hotel
prompts.prompt: Act as a senior client servicing agent. Draft a 280-word complaint-resolution letter from my agency to a Maldives resort on behalf of an Indian guest (₹4.8L package) who experienced (a) wrong room category, (b) WiFi outage 36 hrs, (c) wrong dietary served. Letter should: (1) acknowledge guest's experience without dramatising, (2) factually list each issue, (3) request specific remediation (refund + voucher + complimentary dinner), (4) reference the booking confirmation ID, (5) cite TripAdvisor visibility risk softly, (6) preserve relationship for future bookings, (7) timeline 7 days for response. Constraints: respectful firm tone; INR/USD claim amounts; bilingual receipt; copy to TAFI grievance.

prompts.title: Honeymoon Package Pricing Calculator
prompts.prompt: Act as a travel-pricing analyst. Build a pricing calculator for honeymoon packages (Bali / Phuket / Maldives / Sri Lanka). Inputs: (a) 2-pax couple, (b) destination, (c) 5/7/10 nights, (d) hotel tier (3-/4-/5-star), (e) airfare class, (f) season (peak / shoulder / lean), (g) inclusions (breakfast / HB / FB). Outputs: (1) base cost (hotel + flight + transfer), (2) markup (15-22%), (3) GST 18%, (4) suggested INR retail price, (5) competitor benchmark (MMT/Yatra/Cleartrip), (6) discount slabs (5/10/12% for early-bird, 3/5/7% for repeat). Constraints: realistic INR 2026 rates; commissions disclosed internally; protect margin floor.

prompts.title: Solo Female Traveller Itinerary
prompts.prompt: Act as a travel agent specialising in solo-female safe travel. Build a 10-day solo-female itinerary for a 32-year-old Indian woman exploring Vietnam (Hanoi - Halong - Hue - Hoi An - Saigon). Include safety-first decisions: (1) verified women-friendly accommodations, (2) recommended scooter/cab apps, (3) day-by-day with crowd-density notes, (4) night activities OK / not OK, (5) emergency contacts (Indian embassy + 24/7 hotline + local police), (6) clothing + cultural respect notes, (7) communication (eSIM + offline map), (8) approximate INR budget. Constraints: budget ₹1.4L all-in; respect Buddhist + Vietnamese culture; vegetarian options daily; period-friendly buffer days.

prompts.title: MICE Event Travel Coordination
prompts.prompt: Act as a MICE travel coordinator. Plan the travel logistics for a 180-pax pharma conference in Bangkok (4 days). Cover: (1) flight blocks (Air India + Indigo Bangkok), (2) hotel block (Conrad Bangkok), (3) airport-hotel-venue transfers, (4) visa-on-arrival processing (Form), (5) F&B during conference (special diet split — Jain, halal, no-onion), (6) one cultural evening (Chao Phraya cruise), (7) emergency medical (in-house doctor + hospital tie-up), (8) INR vs THB cost breakdown, (9) ground manager. Constraints: 18% GST + 7% Thailand VAT; pharma compliance (no IGA gifts); MoU with Bangkok Convention Bureau.

prompts.title: Domestic India Religious Tour
prompts.prompt: Act as a senior pilgrimage tour operator. Design a 12-day Char Dham (Yamunotri-Gangotri-Kedarnath-Badrinath) circuit for 16 senior pilgrims (60+) from Pune. Cover: (1) altitude acclimatisation plan (avoid AMS), (2) hotel + dharamshala pre-booking (Uttarakhand Char Dham Yatra portal), (3) helicopter option for Kedarnath + Yamunotri, (4) doctor-on-call package, (5) sattvic veg meals, (6) Hindi/Marathi-speaking guide, (7) Aarti darshan timing planning, (8) palanquin / ponies for walks, (9) backup plan for weather closures. Constraints: respect senior fitness limits; oxygen kit + first-aid; Yatra registration mandatory; INR ₹85K/pax all-inclusive.

prompts.title: Cancellation Refund Policy Letter
prompts.prompt: Act as a travel-agency operations manager. Draft a 220-word cancellation-refund letter when a couple cancels a Maldives honeymoon (₹4.8L) 18 days before departure. Per terms: (a) 21-30 days = 25% retention, (b) 8-20 days = 50%, (c) 0-7 days = 100%. Letter should: (1) acknowledge with empathy, (2) cite the contract clause + retention amount (50% = ₹2.4L), (3) explain refund timeline (10-14 days NEFT), (4) offer date-flexible voucher option (100% transferable for 6 months), (5) explain hotel + airline non-refundable splits, (6) sign-off with manager + escalation. Constraints: tone respectful; comply with consumer protection norms; offer flexibility; INR refund honest.

prompts.title: Adventure Travel Risk Brief
prompts.prompt: Act as an adventure travel coordinator. Draft a risk brief for a 12-pax group on a 7-day Spiti Valley road trip (June). Cover: (1) road risks (landslides, pass closures), (2) altitude acclimatisation (Kibber 4,205m), (3) vehicle breakdown protocol, (4) weather (sudden snow), (5) AMS recognition + Diamox protocol, (6) emergency evacuation (chopper + nearest hospital — Reckong Peo / Manali), (7) insurance coverage (≥₹5L medical + evac), (8) local guide + radio comms (no cell), (9) waiver form by traveller, (10) refusal-of-service criteria. Constraints: align with Indian Mountaineering Foundation guidelines; respect tribal villages of Spiti; document chain-of-custody for kids if any.

prompts.title: Email Newsletter for Travel Agency
prompts.prompt: Act as a travel-marketing copywriter. Write a 320-word email newsletter for July 2026 to my 12K-subscriber list. Theme: 'Monsoon Magic — 5 Indian Destinations to Romance the Rain'. Structure: (1) seasonal hook (60 words), (2) 5 destinations (Coorg, Munnar, Lonavala, Cherrapunji, Udaipur — each 40 words + INR package starting price), (3) limited-time offer code (15% off, valid 7 days), (4) safety + monsoon prep tip, (5) CTA + WhatsApp number. Constraints: warm + sensory tone; mobile-readable; ASCI-compliant; inline images suggestion; 3 subject-line variants.

prompts.title: B2B Travel Wholesaler Negotiation
prompts.prompt: Act as a travel agency director with 15 years. Draft a 350-word negotiation email to a destination wholesaler (DMC) in Dubai for FIT + group rate parity for FY26. Email should: (1) recap our last-year volume (1,200 RNs in Dubai), (2) propose volume-tier rate (3 tiers: 1500 / 2500 / 4000 RN annually), (3) request inclusions (free upgrade 1 in 20, free transfer for >5pax), (4) honour-pricing protection (no OTA undercut), (5) cancellation flexibility (up to T-7 free for FIT), (6) marketing co-op (joint Dubai brochure), (7) MoU sign by 30 Apr 2026. Constraints: respectful firm; INR/USD clear; 21-day net payment; commission protection.

prompts.title: Single-Trip Travel Insurance Comparison
prompts.prompt: Act as a travel insurance advisor with 8 years across Bajaj Allianz, ICICI Lombard, HDFC ERGO, TATA AIG, Reliance General. Compare single-trip travel insurance for an Indian family (4 pax) on a 14-day Switzerland trip. Build comparison table: (1) sum insured medical, (2) trip-cancellation cover, (3) checked-baggage loss, (4) flight delay payout, (5) cashless hospitalisation network, (6) pre-existing condition cover, (7) PYTHON (deductible / co-pay), (8) premium INR per family. Recommend top-2 with reasoning. Constraints: cite latest 2026 product features; Schengen mandatory €30K; respect IRDAI guidelines; honest about exclusions.

prompts.title: Festival Tour Package Marketing
prompts.prompt: Act as a marketing manager for a festival-tour-specialist agency. Build a marketing plan for a 5-day Pushkar Mela package (Nov 2026). Cover: (1) target audience (urban adventure seekers, foreign tourists, photo enthusiasts — 28-50), (2) USP (camel-camp accommodation, photography workshop with named photographer), (3) pricing tiers (₹35K / ₹65K / ₹1.1L), (4) channels (Insta carousel + reel, Google Ads, B2B agent kit), (5) timeline (booking-window 4 months pre-event), (6) inventory (40 pax cap), (7) refund clause (event-cancellation insurance), (8) reviews + UGC plan. Constraints: respect Pushkar's holy-town etiquette; align with state tourism dept; 18% GST.
